topbar.addToHomeScreenIosStep1: Tap the Share button in Safari's toolbar.
topbar.addToHomeScreenIosStep2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen".
topbar.addToHomeScreenIosStep3: Tap "Add" to save Seven Fincorp as an app on your device.
topbar.addToHomeScreenAndroidStep1: Open the browser menu (⋮) in Chrome.
topbar.addToHomeScreenAndroidStep2: Tap "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
topbar.addToHomeScreenUnavailable: Your browser does not support installing this site as an app. Try opening it in Safari (iOS) or Chrome (Android).

dashboard.title: Dashboard

calculator.title: Calculator
calculator.heading: EMI calculator
calculator.description: Enter downpayment and disbursement to dealer. Select a 12- or 18-month tenure to see loan amount, IOT cost, processing fee, and EMI update live.
calculator.disclaimer: Insurance and vehicle registration costs are extra and are not included in the loan amount shown in this calculator.
calculator.stage2Description: Add insurance and registration costs. IOT, insurance, and registration include 5% GST. Final invoice is vehicle invoice plus those GST-inclusive amounts.

ledger.title: Commission Ledger
ledger.description: Positive amounts are your earnings; negative amounts are payable to us.

ledger.ledgerEntriesHint: Positive = earnings; negative = payable to us.

ledger.fullBalanceHint: Leave empty to request the full available balance
ledger.queryPlaceholder: Enter your query or dispute reason...

profile.title: Profile
profile.phoneHelper: Enter phone number with country code (e.g., +91 9876543210)
profile.aiFeaturesDescription: AI-powered application summaries are available for all roles. Open any application from the Applications list and use the AI File Summary section to generate or view an AI summary with applicant profile, loan details, strengths, and risks.

formConfiguration.title: Form Configuration
formConfiguration.description: Configure form requirements per product. Use Sections & Fields (product-embedded) or Document Checklist (Product Documents).
formConfiguration.sectionsAndFieldsHint: Configure sections and text fields stored in Loan Products. Fields with label "Empty" or blank are omitted from the client form.
formConfiguration.documentChecklistHint: Define the document checklist for this product (e.g. PAN Card, Aadhaar, Bank Statement).
formConfiguration.useSectionsHint: Switch to product-embedded config (Section N, Field N) stored in Loan Products.
formConfiguration.noDocumentsYet: No documents yet. Add one below.
formConfiguration.selectProductHint: Select a product above to configure its form requirements.
